data.title: Artisan Chocolate Gifts | Chocolatier Scotland | Quirky Chocolate
data.metaDescription: Quirky Chocolate is a Scottish artisan chocolatier that makes beautiful designer chocolate gifts for every occasion. Handmade in the UK and delivered fast! Buy online today.

issues.impact: Google will cut off your title in search results. You're losing valuable click-through real estate.
issues.fix: Trim to under 60 characters. Front-load your most important keywords.

issues.impact: Google truncates long descriptions. Your call-to-action is probably getting cut off.
issues.fix: Trim to 150-160 characters. Put the most important info first.

issues.impact: Multiple H1s confuse search engines about your page's main topic.
issues.fix: Use only one H1 per page. Use H2-H6 for subheadings.

issues.impact: Your links look terrible when shared on Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook. Broken thumbnail = low click rates.
issues.fix: Add og:title, og:description, og:image, and og:url to every page

issues.impact: Missing out on rich snippets (star ratings, prices, availability) in search results.
issues.fix: Add schema.org JSON-LD markup for products, reviews, FAQs, or local business

summary: We analyzed quirkychocolate.com and found 5 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.

fixes.title: Title too long (65 chars)
fixes.reason: Google will cut off your title in search results. You're losing valuable click-through real estate.

fixes.reason: Multiple H1s confuse search engines about your page's main topic.
